title: The Ella Group (NSW) Pty Ltd (trading as Funtime Childcare) — Systemic failures
investigation_objective: The Federal Circuit and Family Court imposed a $37,560 penalty on The Ella Group (NSW) Pty Ltd, trading as Funtime Childcare in Greenacre, Sydney, and a $7,512 penalty on its sole director, for failing to comply with a Fair Work Ombudsman Compliance Notice requiring calculation and back-payment of underpayments owed to a young full-time early childhood educator (April 2021-May 2023). This was the second such compliance-notice penalty action against the same entity and director, following an earlier $28,875 company/$5,775 director penalty reported in September 2025 over a different underpayment period.
scope: Penalised twice by the Federal Circuit and Family Court for failing to comply with Fair Work Ombudsman Compliance Notices over worker underpayments; Court found the company's conduct in the second matter to reflect a serious and deliberate disregard of its legal obligations; Director personally penalised alongside the company on both occasions
